name: the gate catches a rule missing its introduced_in epoch tag (a state-breaking addition)
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/z schemas docs && cp "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/schemas/rubric-rule.schema.json" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/schemas/field-semantics.json" schemas/ && cp "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/consumer-compatibility-contract.md" docs/ && printf 'source:
  id: t
rules:
- id: g-z-no-epoch
  detector: x.sh
' > generated-code-quality-standards/z/z.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-consumer-compatibility.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'surface=epoch .* reason=missing-introduced_in' e.txt && echo catches-missing-epoch 1>&2
